name: France MFI rate — new loans to households for house purchase
notes: PROVISIONAL — Banque de France migrated from the legacy IBM API Connect stack (api.webstat.banque-france.fr/webstat-fr/v1) to an Opendatasoft Explore v2.1 instance at https://webstat.banque-france.fr/api/explore/v2.1/. The public catalogue exposes only one dataset (tableaux_rapports_preetablis = archived report attachments); the 37000+ time series including MFI lending rates are gated behind the developer-portal login. Once BDF_API_KEY is in the runtime: query the catalogue to locate the MFI interest-rate dataset_id (likely something like webstat-bdf-mir or mfi-interest-rates-france) browse its schema to find the SDMX dimension columns then replace this series_id with the form '<dataset_id>|<odsql_where>' encoding the original SDMX dot-key M.FR.B.A2C.A.R.A.2250.EUR.N (households for house purchase). Until verified the fetcher logs a PROVISIONAL warning and skips this row.
